title: guapira obtusiloba
intro: Guapira obtusiloba, also known as the rough-leaved guapira or guapira, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rhamnaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Guapira obtusiloba include the potential relief from pain and inflammation, as well as the protection of cells from oxidative damage. Guapira obtusiloba is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and it can also be used to make a tincture or syrup for its medicinal properties.
